headline: Is The Campbell’s Company (CPB) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is CPB a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on The Campbell’s Company on r/Valueinvesting. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on CPB. The Campbell’s Company’s share was trading at $20.91 as of March 24th. CPB’s trailing and forward P/E were 11.46 and 9.01 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. headline: Conagra Brands: A+ Valuation, 9% Dividend, Lowest Price Since 2009 = Strong Buy
summary: Conagra Brands historically outperformed S&P 500 during recessions, benefiting from consumers trading down to cheaper food offerings. See why CAG is a Strong Buy.
